GET /v1/dev/bootstrap-secret.truth_boundary: Developer bootstrap secret route is local/rehearsal gated by runtime posture and must not be treated as a public production secret surface.

GET /v1/feed.truth_boundary: Public feed returns visible public posts only; default recency remains legacy-compatible while optional ranked modes use deterministic score/nonce/id cursors.

GET /v1/messages/threads.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; 403 session_missing/session_invalid; 404 not_found for inaccessible resources
GET /v1/messages/threads.truth_boundary: Thread summaries are viewer-scoped and require a valid account session. They are not generic public read snapshots.

GET /v1/messages/threads/{thread_id:path.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; 403 session_missing/session_invalid; 404 not_found for inaccessible resources
GET /v1/messages/threads/{thread_id:path.truth_boundary: Thread detail reads are viewer-scoped and require membership plus a valid account session.

GET /v1/metrics.truth_boundary: Metrics exposure is deployment-gated and not a generic public read surface.

GET /v1/net/peers.error_model: 404 debug_disabled or route-specific network diagnostic error
GET /v1/net/peers.truth_boundary: Network peer diagnostics are not generic public state snapshots.

GET /v1/net/relay/fetch.truth_boundary: Relay fetch is a node/observer transport queue read with route-specific authority and cursor/replay semantics, not generic public state.

GET /v1/observer/edge/status.truth_boundary: Observer edge status is diagnostic posture/status for the observer edge path and grants no validator or mutation authority.

GET /v1/poh/async/case/{case_id}.truth_boundary: Async PoH case reads are public/private hybrid read models; private evidence is included only for authorized applicant or assigned reviewer sessions.

GET /v1/poh/async/juror-cases.truth_boundary: Async PoH juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/async/my-cases.truth_boundary: Async PoH my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/we.truth_boundary: WebRTC signal reads are live-session participant scoped and must not be indexed as generic public snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/case/{case_id}.truth_boundary: Tier-2 PoH case reads may include sensitive evidence/status fields and must be treated as session-aware redacted case reads, not generic public snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/juror-cases.truth_boundary: Tier-2 juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/my-cases.truth_boundary: Tier-2 my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts.truth_boundary: Reviewer artifacts are disabled unless WEALL_REVIEWER_ARTIFACTS_ENABLED and artifact directory are explicitly configured.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts/bundle.truth_boundary: Disposable reviewer bundle read only; not canonical production authority.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts/manifest.truth_boundary: Disposable reviewer manifest read only; not canonical production authority.

GET /v1/session/me.truth_boundary: Returns unauthenticated diagnostic status when headers are absent and scoped session status only when valid session headers are present; not a generic state snapshot.

GET /v1/status/launch-matrix.truth_boundary: Read-only public launch capability matrix; does not activate or disable consensus rules by itself.

GET /v1/status/operator.truth_boundary: Operator status is diagnostic posture evidence and must not be treated as authority-granting.

POST /v1/net/relay/fetch.truth_boundary: Relay fetch POST is a node/observer transport queue interaction with route-specific authority and replay/cursor semantics.

POST /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/w.truth_boundary: WebRTC signal writes are participant-scoped transport messages, not public state mutations.
Bridge imports are cross-node rehearsal transport records; not a public write surface.

truth_boundary: Sidecar metadata overrides static heuristics for public-readiness API inventory. Runtime route code remains authoritative for enforcement.
